languages.text: "Какой пылкий монолог, Инскрибия. К вышесказанному еще будут поправки, дополнения… оправдания?"

traits.locale_text: "Ты забыла свое место, Инскрибия. Кому-то нужно тебя остановить, и это буду я. Есть что сказать в свое оправдание?"

languages.text: "You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"
languages.original_text: "Ты забыла свое место, Инскрибия. Кому-то нужно тебя остановить, и это буду я. Есть что сказать в свое оправдание?"

traits.locale_text: "You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and this duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"
"You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and this duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"
"You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"
"You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"
"You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"
"You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"
"You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"

languages.text: "Ihr habt vergessen, wo Ihr steht, Inscribia. Jemand muss Euch aufhalten, und diese Pflicht fällt mir zu. Habt Ihr etwas zu Eurer Verteidigung zu sagen?"
languages.original_text: "You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"

traits.locale_text: "Ihr habt vergessen, wo Ihr steht, Inscribia. Jemand muss Euch aufhalten, und diese Pflicht fällt mir zu. Habt Ihr etwas zu Eurer Verteidigung zu sagen?"

languages.text: « Vous avez outrepassé vos pouvoirs, Inscribia. Quelqu'un doit vous arrêter, et c'est à moi que ce devoir incombe. Avez-vous quelque chose à dire pour votre défense ? »
languages.original_text: "You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"

traits.locale_text: « Vous avez outrepassé vos pouvoirs, Inscribia. Quelqu'un doit vous arrêter, et c'est à moi que ce devoir incombe. Avez-vous quelque chose à dire pour votre défense ? »

languages.text: “你实在是太忘乎所以了，缮师。必须有人阻止你，而这就是我的责任。你有什么要为自己辩护的吗？”
languages.original_text: "You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"

traits.locale_text: “你实在是太忘乎所以了，缮师。必须有人阻止你，而这就是我的责任。你有什么要为自己辩护的吗？”

languages.text: «Ha olvidado cuál es su sitio, Inscribia. Debe ser detenida, y me corresponde la tarea. ¿Tiene algo que alegar en su defensa?».
languages.original_text: "You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"

traits.locale_text: «Ha olvidado cuál es su sitio, Inscribia. Debe ser detenida, y me corresponde la tarea. ¿Tiene algo que alegar en su defensa?».

languages.text: 「インスクリビア、君は自分の立場を忘れている。君は止められなければならなかった。その義務は{mf|俺|私}にある。何か弁明はあるか？」
languages.original_text: "You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"

traits.locale_text: 「インスクリビア、君は自分の立場を忘れている。君は止められなければならなかった。その義務は{mf|俺|私}にある。何か弁明はあるか？」

languages.text: "Haddini aştın İnscribia. Sana engel olmak benim vazifem. Kendini savunacak mısın?"
languages.original_text: "You have forgotten your place, Inscribia. You must be stopped, and that duty falls to me. Do you have anything to say in your defence?"

traits.locale_text: "Haddini aştın Inscribia. Sana engel olmak vazifesi, benim yükümlülüğümdür. Bir savunman var mı?”
